testcase.name: Cart Item Display Details › should display correct quantity for each cart item

SauceDemo Login Tests › can clear error message

SauceDemo Products Tests › User can remove product from the cart

SauceDemo Products Tests › can sort products by name Z-A
SauceDemo Products Tests › can sort products by price low to high
SauceDemo Products Tests › can sort products by price high to low
